It’s better over here. Experience it all on America's Best Network.

Best Mobile Network according to Ookla® Speedtest®. 

Based on analysis by Ookla of Speedtest Intelligence® data 2H 2025.
Ookla trademarks used under license and reprinted with permission.

T-Mobile customers had the lowest wireless bills vs. Verizon and AT&T over the past 5 years.

Based on HarrisX Billing Snapshots.

Based on HarrisX Billing Snapshots from Q3 ’21–Q4 ’25 compared to average AT&T and Verizon bills. Comparison exclude discounts, credits, and optional charges. For more details, visit harrisx.com/T-Mobile-bills.

Comparing the average of postpaid consumer bills with T-Mobile vs. Verizon and AT&T plans. Excludes credits, discounts, and additional/optional charges (e.g., device, equipment, insurance, voicemail, international, overage, certain local charges). Bills sourced from HarrisX's Billing Snapshots product for each billing period between May 2021–December 2025 with data collected from July 2021–December 2025. Data is tabulated and reported monthly with a total sample of approximately 2,575 respondents per wave, reflecting the "most recent, completed bill" of the respondent at time of collection. While HarrisX intends to provide data that is nationally representative, some variance may occur due to sample limitation.

INTRODUCING EASY UPGRADE WITH FAMILY FREEDOM

Say yes to America's Best Network.

Ditch Verizon and upgrade to the Best Mobile Network in the U.S., according to Ookla® Speedtest®. We’ll help you pay off 4 of your current phones (up to $800/line) via virtual prepaid card and hook you up with 4 phones On Us—all for $100/month. There's never been a better time to join.

Best: Based on analysis by Ookla® of Speedtest Intelligence® data 2H 2025. Via 24 monthly bill credits, 4 eligible trade-ins & 4 new lines with AutoPay. For well-qualified customers; plus taxes/fees & $35/line connection charge. New financed devices, qualifying service & port-in required. Up to $800/line; card typically takes 15 days.

Here’s how it works:

  • Download your most recent bill from your current carrier.

    Download the PDF version that includes mobile number, device make and model, financing details, and payoff amount.

  • Trade in your phone for a new one.

    Your device might be locked to your current carrier, no problem. Just trade it in and skip the hassle of unlocking. You must trade in your phone to be eligible for this offer.

    Shop online

  • Bring your phone number.

    To be eligible for this offer, you must keep your current number when you switch to T-Mobile. Most phone numbers can easily be transferred to our network.

    Check your number

  • Submit to get paid.

    Once you have your new T-Mobile phone, submit that PDF you downloaded from your previous carrier. To be eligible for the offer, the bill must have the mobile number you brought over, device make and model, and financing details.

    Start submission

Switch and save on our best deals.

APPLE

iPhone 17 Pro On Us.
No trade-in needed.

Shop now
Get the ultimate Pro when you switch to T-Mobile and bring your number on an Experience More or Experience Beyond plan. With 24 monthly bill credits.
No trade-in needed
SAMSUNG

New Samsung Galaxy S26+ On Us.

Shop now
Experience an ultra-vivid display that makes for a more immersive experience. Get yours when you activate a line on Experience More or Experience Beyond. With 24 monthly bill credits.
APPLE

iPhone 17—Get 4 On Us. Plus, 4 lines for $25/line/mo.

Shop now
More delightful. More durable. Yours when you trade in an eligible phone and add qualifying lines on our Essentials promo plan. With 24 monthly bill credits.
No trade-in needed
MOTOROLA

New motorola razr On Us. No trade-in needed.

Shop now
Endless ways to capture. Yours when you activate a new line on an Experience More plan. Via 24 monthly bill credits.
Available for 55+, Military & First Responders too
APPLE

iPhone 15—Get 4 On Us. Plus, 4 lines for $25/line/mo. No trade-in needed.

Shop now
Experience everyday premium. Switch to T-Mobile and get 4 phones On Us when you bring your number on our Essentials promo plan. With AutoPay; plus taxes and fees. Via 24 monthly bill credits.
No trade-in needed
MOTOROLA

Save $1100 on the new motorola razr fold.

Shop now for motorola razr fold.
Set a new fold standard. Get yours when you activate a new line on an Experience Beyond plan. With 24 monthly bill credits.
No trade-in needed
GOOGLE AI IS AT ITS BEST

Get 4 new Pixel 10a On Us with 4 new lines for $25/line/mo.

Shop now
Taxes & fees apply. Essentials plan w/ autopay. Plus, get Pixel Buds 2a On Us. Phone: via 24 monthly credits when you add qualifying lines. Buds: via instant discount with Pixel 10a purchase on a qualifying plan.
No trade-in needed
SAMSUNG

Get the new Galaxy S26 On Us.

Shop now
Creative tools and smart assistance right at your fingertips with Galaxy AI. Yours when you activate a new line on most plans. With 24 monthly bill credits when you add a line on most plans.
No trade-in needed
APPLE

Get the new iPhone 17e On Us.

Shop now
Browse and binge movies for hours on end with an all-day battery life. Get one On Us via 24 monthly bill credits when you switch to T-Mobile and bring your number on most plans. Includes 55+, Military, First Responder Segment plans.
APPLE

Get iPhone 17 On Us. No trade-in needed.

Shop now
More delightful. More durable. Yours when you switch to T-Mobile and bring your number on an Experience More or Experience Beyond plan. With 24 monthly bill credits.
No trade-in needed
HIGH-VALUE DEAL

Free select smartphones.

Shop now
Yours FREE when you add a line on most plans. Via 24 monthly bill credits.
Low down payment
APPLE

iPhone 15.
Get up to 50% off. 

Shop now
Shop online now and get up to $315 off via 24 monthly bill credits when you add a line on a qualifying plan.
TOP BRANDS. GREAT VALUE.

Your favorite phones.
Now with a lower down payment.

Check out

If you cancel entire account before receiving 24 credits, credits stop and balance on required finance agreement is due; for phones, contact us. Bill credits end if you pay off device early. For well-qualified customers, plus tax & $35 device connection charge.

Switch to T-Mobile.

It’s easy. Just pick the way that’s best for you.

Start your switch
1-844-222-1938
Find a store

Hello! Want to stay logged in?

To keep your accounts safe, you'll be automatically logged out in: 

Share your screen while on a call or in store

Get guided support from an Expert in real time

  • For your security, personal info, tabs, and notifications are automatically hidden.
  • You can stop screen sharing at any time.
  • Experts can only see what’s on T-Mobile.com.
  • Don’t use screen share while driving or in any situation where it's unsafe to focus on your screen.

By clicking 'Accept and continue,' you are consenting to allow the Expert to view your screen for assisted navigation. This session may be recorded. To learn more, please visit the  T-Mobile Privacy Notice.

Next: Generate a code to share with your Expert

Share this code with your Expert

code

Once your code has been successfully entered by your Expert, this window will close and continue to the session.

Allow screen sharing with your Expert?

Personal and sensitive data is hidden for your security and privacy.

End your session?

Ending your session will stop sharing your screen, but will not end your call.

Your session has ended

Your screen is no longer being shared with your Expert.

You are already in an active session

Your code has expired

Generate a new one to share with your Expert.
